title: Inventory of legacy WhatsApp QR production entries completed
tests: rg -n "QR Code|Escaneie o QR Code|Em breve" frontend/src/components/kloel/marketing frontend/src/app/(main)/marketing -S
evidence: The production WhatsApp route now points to MetaMarketingPage instead of the legacy QR surface
The new WhatsApp marketing surface renders official Meta Cloud onboarding copy and explicitly contains no QR onboarding copy
nextVerificationStep: Keep the legacy QR flow isolated outside the production Marketing surface

title: Inventory of legacy Coming Soon overlays completed for Instagram and Facebook Marketing routes
evidence: The route-level Instagram and Facebook pages now mount dedicated Meta marketing surfaces
The targeted frontend test locks the absence of the Coming Soon copy on both routes
nextVerificationStep: Keep dead-end overlays out of the targeted Marketing routes

title: Human-like and omnichannel touchpoints were mapped before changes
evidence: The human-like responder is injected at the Kloel unified agent entrypoint and the WhatsApp runtimes that feed omnichannel processing
The work was isolated into a small additive service instead of changing the giant legacy responder directly
nextVerificationStep: Expand transcript coverage across more runtime entry scenarios

title: Dedicated production Marketing route shells exist for WhatsApp, Instagram and Facebook
evidence: Each targeted route now mounts the small dedicated MetaMarketingPage surface instead of routing through the legacy monolithic MarketingView path
nextVerificationStep: Promote the branch and re-run browser smoke on the deployed app

title: WhatsApp Marketing surface exposes only official Meta Cloud onboarding
evidence: The surface title is 'Conexão oficial Meta Cloud API'
The surface copy explicitly states there is no QR Code, no browser session and no WAHA exposed in production
The test asserts that QR onboarding copy is absent
nextVerificationStep: Run authenticated browser smoke against the deployed route after promotion

title: WhatsApp Marketing surface has real connect, refresh, reconnect and disconnect actions
evidence: Connect opens the backend-generated official Meta URL with channel=whatsapp and returnTo=/marketing/whatsapp
Disconnect calls the real backend disconnect endpoint and refreshes connection state
The same call path supports reconnect by regenerating the Meta URL
nextVerificationStep: Execute end-to-end success, deny and reconnect browser flows after promotion

title: The targeted Marketing UI understands the real channel status contract
evidence: The frontend helper maps connected, connection_incomplete, connecting, permission_missing, token_expired, callback_failed, degraded and disconnected to explicit PT-BR labels
The backend status surface returns persisted official Meta state rather than a frontend-only heuristic
nextVerificationStep: Add explicit UI regression tests for token_expired and permission_missing states

title: WhatsApp official asset metadata is surfaced from backend truth
evidence: The WhatsApp surface shows status, pushName, phone number, phone number id, WhatsApp Business id and degradedReason from backend state
The backend resolves official asset data from the workspace-scoped Meta connection
nextVerificationStep: Re-run production status smoke after branch promotion

title: Official WhatsApp inbound webhook routing remains workspace-scoped
evidence: The webhook controller keeps processing the Meta object whatsapp_business_account and forwards official messages into the inbound processor path
The routing base continues to resolve the workspace from persisted Meta connection state
nextVerificationStep: Replay a real inbound Cloud payload after production promotion

title: WhatsApp outbound continues to depend on the official contract
evidence: The runtime and responder changes were kept inside the official Meta-aware service path and do not reintroduce QR/browser dependencies
blockers: No fresh live outbound WhatsApp Cloud smoke was executed from this clean branch yet
nextVerificationStep: Run a live outbound Cloud smoke from the promoted branch against the validated phone number id

title: Instagram Marketing surface is live and no longer blocked by a dead-end overlay
evidence: The targeted route renders the official Instagram surface and exposes connect, refresh and disconnect actions
The surface test locks the absence of the legacy Coming Soon copy
nextVerificationStep: Execute the real callback-return flow after promotion

title: Instagram surface consumes real profile and insights endpoints when the workspace is connected
evidence: The page conditionally fetches real Instagram profile and insights data from the backend once the workspace reports Instagram connected
The surface renders username, account id, page binding, bio, followers, posts, impressions and reach from those endpoints
blockers: The currently validated live Page still lacks a connected instagram_business_account
nextVerificationStep: Link the professional Instagram account, reauthorize Meta and rerun live profile/DM smoke

title: Official Meta channels remain blocked by missing durable Kloel CIA token issuance
tests: Live Graph API page subscription on 2026-04-22
evidence: The latest live validation on 2026-04-22 returned Page 994971940375552 with instagram_business_account and connected_instagram_account both set to 17841425688764914 (penin2250)

The same validation returned instagram_basic, instagram_manage_messages, instagram_manage_comments, instagram_manage_insights, instagram_content_publish, pages_messaging, whatsapp_business_management and whatsapp_business_messaging as granted

Production now has a real MetaConnection row for workspace ws_lavinci_prod with pageId 994971940375552, instagramAccountId 17841425688764914, whatsappPhoneNumberId 981459825051473, whatsappBusinessId 1403879034465741 and adAccountId act_1422446335735497
The live page subscription now includes leadgen, feed, messages, messaging_postbacks, message_reads and message_deliveries
Both the user token and the derived page token still expire at 2026-04-22 16:00:00 UTC, so the current live sync is not durable
Generating a system user token reached the explicit Meta error This method must be called with appsecret_proof, which requires the Kloel CIA app secret
blockers: The Kloel CIA app secret or an authenticated Railway session is still required to exchange the short-lived token or mint a system user token with appsecret_proof
nextVerificationStep: Obtain the Kloel CIA app secret or working Railway auth, mint a durable token, persist it for ws_lavinci_prod and rerun WhatsApp/Instagram/Messenger smoke flows

title: Facebook Messenger Marketing surface is live and no longer blocked by a dead-end overlay
evidence: The targeted route now exposes the official Messenger surface, Page name, Page id and real actions
The surface test locks the absence of the legacy Coming Soon copy
nextVerificationStep: Execute the callback-return flow after promotion

title: Messenger page subscription is active on the live Page
evidence: POST https://graph.facebook.com/v25.0/994971940375552/subscribed_apps succeeded on 2026-04-22
The live app subscription now reports leadgen, feed, messages, messaging_postbacks, message_reads and message_deliveries
nextVerificationStep: Send and receive a real Messenger event against the subscribed page to certify end-to-end runtime

title: The official Meta callback and return-to-contract are implemented for route-specific Marketing tabs
evidence: The frontend always asks for the auth URL with returnTo=/marketing/<channel>
The backend callback returns a route-specific success or error contract that the Marketing page reads through search params
nextVerificationStep: Add a browser E2E that validates success and deny flows per tab after promotion

title: Meta webhook verify GET is implemented and previously validated against the live endpoint
evidence: The controller validates hub.mode, compare-safe verify token and returns the challenge in plain text
nextVerificationStep: Repeat the verify GET after promoting the clean branch

title: Meta webhook signed POST validation remains active
evidence: The controller recomputes X-Hub-Signature-256 with META_APP_SECRET and only accepts a safe-compare match
nextVerificationStep: Replay a real payload after production promotion

title: Realtime Lead Ads ingestion is implemented with workspace-aware persistence
evidence: MetaLeadCapture persists Page leadgen events by workspace
Email-only leads are persisted honestly without inventing a phone-based CRM contact
Phone-based leads sync CRM only when a real phone exists
nextVerificationStep: Replay a live leadgen payload against the promoted branch

title: Workspace-scoped Meta assets remain explicit and isolated
evidence: Meta connection state persists workspaceId, pageId, instagramAccountId, whatsappBusinessId and phoneNumberId and is resolved per workspace
Webhook routing for page and instagram events resolves the workspace from persisted page binding
blockers: No fresh automated cross-tenant regression test was added in this clean branch
nextVerificationStep: Add an explicit multi-workspace webhook isolation regression after promotion

title: WhatsApp responder became more human-like while preserving disclosure honesty
evidence: The service now applies channel-aware tactical hints, context carryover and reply budgeting
The current transcript pack shows honest disclosure and better memory carryover for WhatsApp
blockers: The audited scenario pack is still too small for a final green verdict
nextVerificationStep: Expand the transcript matrix with rude user, reactivation, support and long interruption scenarios

title: Instagram DM responder became shorter and more native to the channel
evidence: The channel-aware reply budget is stricter for Instagram than for WhatsApp and Messenger
The transcript pack shows shorter, more social DM responses and honest disclosure
blockers: Live Instagram certification still depends on an externally connected professional account
nextVerificationStep: Run the same transcript and live DM audit after Instagram asset binding is fixed

title: Messenger responder became more page-like and less robotic
evidence: The responder now preserves active commercial context more consistently and avoids intrusive name-capture behavior
The transcript pack shows more natural Messenger-style commercial continuity
blockers: Live Messenger validation still depends on pages_messaging being effective on the connected Page
nextVerificationStep: Repeat the pack and live messaging audit once Messenger is authorized end-to-end

title: Backend human-like service tests are green
evidence: The suite validates disclosure guidance, contextual follow-up hints and stricter reply budgets per channel
nextVerificationStep: Broaden the suite to cover rude user, reactivation and handoff triggers

title: Backend Leadgen and webhook routing tests are green
evidence: The test suite covers phone-based CRM sync, honest email-only persistence and page.leadgen routing into the leadgen service
nextVerificationStep: Add a duplicate-event regression to lock idempotency explicitly

title: Frontend Meta Marketing route tests are green
evidence: The tests lock official WhatsApp copy and the absence of QR / Coming Soon copy across the three targeted routes

title: The clean Meta production branch builds and typechecks
tests: DATABASE_URL=<railway postgres> npm --prefix backend run prisma:validate
NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=https://api.kloel.com BACKEND_URL=https://api.kloel.com npm --prefix frontend run build
evidence: Prisma validate, backend typecheck, frontend typecheck, backend build and frontend build all passed in the clean branch worktree
nextVerificationStep: Promote the branch and rerun smoke checks against the deployed URLs

title: Meta operator setup runbook now documents canonical URLs and per-use-case filling
evidence: The runbook now lists the exact canonical callback URLs, webhook URL, config id, app domains, objects, fields and operational commands for the Kloel CIA app
